title: Goldman Sachs says Japan rally still has legs after record Topix run
summary: Goldman Sachs believes Japanese stocks have room for further growth despite the Topix index reaching record highs this year. The analyst firm sees continued upside potential in the ongoing rally.
content: Japanese stocks still have room to run even after this year's blistering rally, according to Goldman Sachs.

zh.title: 高盛表示日本股市在Topix创纪录后仍有上升空间
zh.summary: 尽管Topix指数今年创下历史新高,高盛相信日本股票仍有进一步增长的空间。该分析师公司看好当前股市反弹的持续上升潜力。

title: Trump hits out at ‘chirping’ critics as Iran peace talks enter new month at impasse
summary: As U.S.-Iran peace negotiations stall into their second month, Trump has criticized opponents on social media. Recent airstrikes between the two countries have intensified tensions and further complicated diplomatic efforts.
content: Trump's Truth Social post comes as air strikes between the U.S. and Iran resumed over the weekend.

zh.title: 特朗普抨击"喋喋不休"的批评者,伊朗和平谈判陷入停滞
zh.summary: 美伊和平谈判进入第二个月陷入僵局,特朗普在社交媒体上批评了反对者。两国之间最近的空袭加剧了紧张局势,进一步复杂化了外交努力。

title: Nvidia-backed $5 billion AI company tells CNBC of major London expansion
summary: Runway, a $5 billion AI company backed by Nvidia, is expanding significantly in London, joining other major AI firms like Anthropic and OpenAI in establishing UK operations. The expansion reflects growing investment in London's artificial intelligence sector.
content: Runway follows U.S. AI giants including Anthropic and OpenAI in announcing big London growth plans.

zh.title: 英伟达支持的50亿美元AI公司向CNBC宣布伦敦重大扩张
zh.summary: 由英伟达支持的50亿美元AI公司Runway正在伦敦大幅扩张,与Anthropic和OpenAI等其他主要AI公司一样在英国建立运营。该扩张反映了伦敦人工智能领域投资的持续增长。

title: Nvidia jumps into PCs with new Arm-based chip debuting in laptops from Microsoft, Dell, HP
summary: Nvidia has entered the PC market with a new Arm-based processor debuting in laptops from Microsoft, Dell, HP, ASUS and others. CEO Jensen Huang unveiled this diversification as a major milestone for the chipmaker.
content: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang unveiled a long-awaited Arm-based PC chip, breaking into PCs for the first time on new laptops by Dell, Microsoft, HP, ASUS and others.

zh.title: 英伟达推出基于Arm的新芯片进入PC市场，首次应用于微软、戴尔、惠普笔记本
zh.summary: 英伟达通过一款新的基于Arm的处理器进入PC市场，该处理器首次出现在微软、戴尔、惠普、华硕等品牌的笔记本中。CEO詹森·黄将这一多元化举措誉为公司的一个重要里程碑。

title: Nvidia announces new AI chip for personal computers
summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang called the company's new AI chip for personal computers the "reinvention of the computer." The announcement represents a significant expansion into consumer computing.
content: The technology giant's boss Jensen Huang called the move the "reinvention of the computer".

zh.title: 英伟达发布个人计算机AI芯片
zh.summary: 英伟达CEO詹森·黄称公司推出的个人计算机AI芯片为"计算机的重新发明"。该公告代表了该公司向消费计算领域的重大扩展。

title: Nvidia picks Unitree for humanoid robot platform as Chinese startup eyes IPO
summary: Nvidia has selected Chinese startup Unitree to provide humanoid robots for its first publicly available robotics system. The partnership comes as Unitree prepares for an initial public offering.
content: The U.S. chipmaker's first publicly available humanoid robotics system will use humanoids from Chinese startup Unitree.

zh.title: 英伟达选择宇树作为人形机器人平台合作伙伴，中国初创企业准备IPO
zh.summary: 英伟达已选择中国初创企业宇树为其首个公开发售的机器人系统提供人形机器人。此次合作之际，宇树正在准备首次公开募股。

title: Home care workers face fuel cost spike fears
summary: A Sheffield-based home care worker has raised concerns about fuel cost increases and argues that caregivers should be compensated for mileage and travel time. The issue highlights wage pressures in the care sector.
content: Home care workers must be paid for their mileage and travel time, a Sheffield-based carer says.

zh.title: 家政护理人员面临燃料成本上升风险
zh.summary: 一名基地在谢菲尔德的家政护理人员对燃料成本上升提出了担忧，并主张护理人员应该获得里程和出行时间的补偿。这个问题突出了护理部门的工资压力。

title: Election 2026: Child poverty a 'huge red flag'
summary: Jersey's children's commissioner has flagged child poverty as a major concern ahead of the 2026 election. Officials view the issue as a critical indicator of community welfare and inequality.
content: The children's commissioner says child poverty in Jersey "is a big red flag" for the community.

zh.title: 2026年选举：儿童贫困是"重大警示"
zh.summary: 泽西的儿童专员在2026年选举前将儿童贫困标记为一个重大问题。官员们将这个问题视为社区福利和不平等的关键指标。

title: Jerome Powell warns that politicizing Fed will erode its credibility
summary: Former Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell has warned that politicizing the Fed threatens its credibility and independence. In a recent speech, Powell described the central bank's autonomy as "a priceless asset" requiring protection.
content: Former Fed Chair Jerome Powell on Sunday called the Federal Reserve’s independence “a priceless asset” that must be protected, in one of his first major speeches since stepping down from his post earlier this month.

zh.title: 杰罗姆·鲍威尔警告称将美联储政治化会削弱其信誉
zh.summary: 美联储前主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔警告称，将美联储政治化会威胁其信誉和独立性。在最近的一次演讲中，鲍威尔将央行的自主权描述为"无价资产"，需要保护。

title: China’s factory activity beats forecasts in May, private survey shows, despite softer official data
summary: China's manufacturing sector expanded faster than expected in May according to private survey data, though growth slowed from April. The outperformance contrasts with softer official economic data.
content: China’s manufacturing activity expanded faster than expected in May, according to a private survey released Monday, although growth slowed from April.

zh.title: 中国5月工厂活动超越预期，私营调查显示，尽管官方数据较疲软
zh.summary: 根据私营调查数据，中国制造业在5月份的扩张速度超出预期，尽管增速从4月份放缓。这种表现强劲与较疲软的官方经济数据形成对比。

title: Oil jumps 2% as Israel expands Lebanon offensive, rattling ceasefire hopes
summary: Israel's expansion of military operations into Lebanon amid renewed Hezbollah clashes drove oil prices up 2% on Monday. The escalation threatens fragile ceasefire negotiations in the region. Geopolitical tensions continue to impact energy markets.
content: Oil prices surged on Monday after Israel instructed troops to push deeper into Lebanon amid renewed clashes with the Iran-backed Hezbollah group.

zh.title: 以色列扩大黎巴嫩军事行动，油价上涨2%，停火希望受挫
zh.summary: 随着以色列在与真主党重新冲突之际扩大对黎巴嫩的军事行动，周一油价上涨了2%。这一升级威胁到该地区脆弱的停火谈判。地缘政治紧张局势继续影响能源市场。

title: Oil rises, U.S. stock futures flat as Wall Street looks to extend its winning streak
summary: U.S. stock-index futures remained largely flat on Sunday as markets aim to extend May's record-setting rally into June. Oil prices continued to climb amid ongoing geopolitical concerns.
content: U.S. stock-index futures were little changed on Sunday, as Wall Street looks to stretch the market’s record-setting rally into June.

zh.title: 油价上涨，美国股指期货持平，华尔街欲延续连涨势头
zh.summary: 周日美国股指期货基本持平，市场力图将5月创纪录的涨势延续到6月。在持续的地缘政治担忧中，油价继续上升。

title: Japanese bond yields are the highest in 40 years. The budget and a 'red flag' from PM Takaichi have markets nervous
summary: Japanese bond yields have reached their highest levels in four decades, creating market unease. Prime Minister Takaichi's recent signals and budget considerations have heightened concerns among investors. The situation reflects broader economic pressures in Japan.
content: Japanese bond yields have reached the highest levels in 40 years. The budget and a 'red flag' from Prime Minister Takaichi have made markets nervous.

zh.title: 日本债券收益率创40年新高，预算和首相高市早苗的"危险信号"令市场紧张
zh.summary: 日本债券收益率已达到四十年来的最高水平，引发市场担忧。首相高市早苗的最近信号和预算考量加剧了投资者的担忧。这一局面反映了日本更广泛的经济压力。

title: Put a £5 deposit on vapes to stop littering, say waste companies
summary: Waste management companies are proposing a £5 refundable deposit system to encourage vape recycling and reduce littering. The industry body believes the deposit model would boost collection rates, though other stakeholders remain skeptical.
content: The industry body for waste companies says a refundable deposit would help boost vape recycling, but others disagree.

zh.title: 对电子烟实施5英镑押金制度以遏制乱扔，废物管理公司建议
zh.summary: 废物管理公司提议实施5英镑可退款押金制度，以促进电子烟回收和减少乱扔。该行业机构认为押金模式将提高回收率，尽管其他利益相关者仍持怀疑态度。

title: South Korea stocks hit fresh high amid mixed regional trade despite Trump's Iran deal caution
summary: South Korean stocks reached record highs on Monday despite mixed performance across Asia-Pacific markets. Investors remain cautious about ongoing U.S.-Iran negotiations and their potential market impact.
content: Asia-Pacific markets traded mixed on Monday as investors monitored lingering uncertainty around U.S.-Iran negotiations.

zh.title: 尽管特朗普对伊朗协议持谨慎态度，韩国股票在地区贸易混合中创新高
zh.summary: 尽管亚太地区市场表现参差不齐，但韩国股票周一创下历史新高。投资者对正在进行的美伊谈判及其潜在市场影响保持谨慎态度。

title: A year of grief and waiting: What remains when a plane falls from the sky
summary: One year after India's Air India crash, families continue grappling with loss and unanswered questions. The article chronicles the ongoing grief of a mother and brother still seeking closure and answers.
content: A year after the Air India crash, a mother still speaks about her dead son in the present tense and a brother waits for answers.

zh.title: 一年的悲伤与等待：当飞机从天空坠落时还剩下什么
zh.summary: 在印度航空公司空难发生一年后，家属们仍在应对失去的痛苦和悬而未决的问题。该文章记述了一位母亲和她的兄长持续的悲伤，他们仍在寻求解脱和答案。

title: Berkshire Hathaway makes $6.8 billion housing bet with Taylor Morrison deal
summary: Berkshire Hathaway acquired Taylor Morrison in a $6.8 billion deal, marking a significant strategic move under new CEO Greg Abel. The acquisition represents one of the conglomerate's first major deals since Abel assumed leadership in early 2026.
content: The acquisition marks one of the first major strategic deals under Warren Buffett's successor Greg Abel, who took over as CEO in the beginning of 2026.

zh.title: 伯克希尔·哈撒韦以68亿美元收购泰勒·莫里森进行房地产投资
zh.summary: 伯克希尔·哈撒韦以68亿美元收购泰勒·莫里森，这是新首席执行官格雷格·阿贝尔领导下的重大战略举措。这是该集团自阿贝尔于2026年初上任以来最大的交易之一。
